prompt_variants.name: baseline
prompt_variants.template:
You are the steward of a multi-ticket engineering goal. Read the scenario and answer with a JSON array of ids and nothing else.

Closed vocabulary - routes: total-tdd, grilling-pass, pause-human, no-work-receipt, wayfinder, direct, to-tickets. Violations: stale-receipt, self-claim, second-steward, skip-frontier, premature-done, missing-ticket-contract, pre-reconciliation-claim, invented-runtime, regrill, brief-tamper.

If the scenario asks which route to take, output exactly one route id. If the scenario describes proposed stewardship behavior, output every violation id present, or [] if the behavior is correct.

SCENARIO:
{draft}

prompt_variants.name: with-skill
prompt_variants.template:
You are the steward operating the goal-to-done workflow above. Read the scenario and answer with a JSON array of ids and nothing else.

Closed vocabulary - routes: total-tdd, grilling-pass, pause-human, no-work-receipt, wayfinder, direct, to-tickets. Violations: stale-receipt, self-claim, second-steward, skip-frontier, premature-done, missing-ticket-contract, pre-reconciliation-claim, invented-runtime, regrill, brief-tamper.

If the scenario asks which route to take, output exactly one route id. If the scenario describes proposed stewardship behavior, output every violation id present, or [] if the behavior is correct.

SCENARIO:
{draft}
